intentSynonyms: show me my comment replies in confluence
view my comment replies in confluence
see all my comment replies in confluence
list replies to a comment in confluence
description: List replies (child comments) on a Confluence comment. Works for both inline and footer comments. Specify the comment type to use the correct API endpoint.

comment_id.description: Parent comment ID to list replies for

comment_type.description: Type of the parent comment: "inline" or "footer"

limit.description: Maximum number of replies to return (default 25, max 250)

cursor.description: Pagination cursor from a previous response

body_format.description: Body format to return: "storage" (HTML, default) or "atlas_doc_format" (ADF)
